name: Orange Pineapple Appetizer Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Egg Beaters® 99% egg substitute, thawed
1 8 oz can pineapple tid bits in unsweetened juice, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine all meatball ingredients; mix well.
2. Shape into about 36 (1-inch) balls.
3. Spray a large non-stick skillet with non-stick cooking spray and heat over medium-high heat until hot.
4. Add meatballs to the skillet and cook for 8 to 10 minutes, or until browned and centers are no longer pink. Turn frequently.
5. Stir in all sauce ingredients. Cook over medium heat for 3 or 4 minutes, or until thoroughly heated, stirring once.
6. Tip: To make ahead, prepare meatballs in the sauce as directed above. Place in a covered container; refrigerate. To reheat, place in a microwave-safe bowl and microwave on high until thoroughly heated, stirring occasionally.
